rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Will you be at home to-morrow morning ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: illa, hattu gantege naanu maneeli iralla.
rows.english: No, at 10 I'll not be at home.
At that time, I will be in the office.

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: niivu yaavaagluu astu hottinall affisalli irtiiraa ?
rows.english: Will you be in the office always at that time ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Who else will be there In the office ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: namma meeneejar irtaare, taipist raani irtaale, obba javaana irtaane.
rows.english: Tne manager will be there. Typist Rani will be there. One peon will be there.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Where will the typewriter be in your office ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Kannada typewriter will be in that room.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Where will the English Typewriter be?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: They won't be there at this time.
They will be in typist's desk.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Won't there be the typist at this time?
